productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Nike Black sling Duffle Bags
description: nike presents the prefect T90 bag. With three different styles of straps, you can use it as a duffel bag, backpack, or cross-body depending on your comfort level, and for style. Carry this attractive and useful bag to the gym, for your soccer, tennis, cricket or any other game to store your shoes, socks, clothes and other items. This handy little bag is guaranteed to get you loads of attention! Measurement Length: 50 cm Width: 27 cm Height: 24 cm Capacity: 28 litres Made of polyester for enhanced durability and style Nylon lining for increased durability Water-resistant tarapaulin bottom One main roomy zippered compartment with a small pouch with Velcro closure A zippered pocket on the side, with a mesh pouch on it for storing essentials Zippered ventilated shoe compartment on the side Straps that can be used in three different ways: hang single strap on the shoulder to use as duffel bag, sling the single strap diagonally across the chest, or carry as a backpack using two straps Graphic print all over with nike Swoosh printed on the front T90 printed on the base in large lettering for branding and added attraction Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
